what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-source image asset; it stores YAML frontmatter identifying the image 'capital-raise/p-12' and a one-line body declaring it as source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type, name, and timestamps
Image dimensions w and h are both 0
Body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-12.jpg'
standouts: Recorded width and height are 0 despite being an image
Explicitly labeled as design ground-truth source material
conventions: Follows YAML frontmatter + markdown body format
Uses URI-style identifiers: image://design-source/... and blob://b2:...
Includes ISO 8601 creation timestamp and author session id
concerns: Zero width/height for an image record may indicate missing or uncomputed metadata
No descriptive caption, alt text, or content summary for the image
No links/relationships recorded, so context is isolated
Blob integrity cannot be verified from this file alone
notes: A sparse but canonical ledger pointer to a capital-raise design-source JPEG blob, with missing image dimensions and no relational links.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-12.jpg contain?
Where is the blob blob://b2:a08aeea086d0d038160ef95d9e964348 physically stored?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a SOURCE design ground-truth record matches what the file does: it catalogs the image asset and points to its blob.
intention_signals: The file appears intended to establish an auditable, stable ledger entry that binds a design-source image identifier to its content-addressed blob and channel for retrieval and fusion.
novelty: The combination of image:// channel addressing, blob://b2: content hashing, and explicit 'design ground-truth' labeling in a markdown ledger entry is distinctive; the zero-dimension image record is unusual.
contribution: It contributes a stable identifier, content-addressed blob pointer, source channel, mime type, and creation provenance for the capital-raise/p-12 image asset, which a fused system could use to locate and attribute the source image.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the design-source JPEG image 'capital-raise/p-12' with a content-addressed blob pointer, zero recorded dimensions, and creation provenance.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and preserve ground-truth source material for a capital-raise design image in a content-addressed channel-memory store.
